title: delphinium wrightii var. wrightii
intro: Delphinium wrightii var. wrightii, also known as Wright's delphinium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties include its antispasmodic, antitussive, and expectorant actions, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, coughs, and other conditions. The health benefits of Delphinium wrightii var. wrightii include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease respiratory symptoms, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues.
